metadata.description: Give Claude a video input. /watch downloads, extracts scene-change frames, microscopes the 0-10s hook, transcribes, and optionally auto-saves to your Obsidian vault.

plugins.name: watch
plugins.description: Watch a video (URL or local path). Downloads with yt-dlp, extracts scene-change frames with ffmpeg, runs a 0-10s hook microscope, transcribes via captions or Whisper, emits a structured report.md, optional Obsidian auto-save.
